title: Sentinel — Regulatory Compliance Auditor
tagline: Agentic RAG that audits 200 enterprise SOPs against 36 regulatory frameworks and files gap findings as Jira tickets.
summary: Sentinel is a complete, deployable compliance auditor. A LangGraph ReAct agent fans out 10-wide parallel sub-agents that each audit one Standard Operating Procedure against the regulatory frameworks that apply to it — retrieving regulation text from Pinecone via semantic search, optionally checking live guidance with Tavily, recording structured findings, and filing gaps and partials as labeled Jira tickets. It ships with a React UI, a 200-SOP synthetic corpus for a fictional healthcare fintech, a 36-framework regulation knowledge base, and an evaluation harness that scores audit runs against a ground-truth compliance matrix.

dataset.description: 200 synthetic SOPs across 10 business units + 36 regulation frameworks with a ground-truth compliance matrix.

quickstart.configure: cp .env.example .env  # then fill NEBIUS_API_KEY, PINECONE_API_KEY, TAVILY_API_KEY
quickstart.run: make install && make ingest && make ingest-regulations && make dev
